meanings.definition: a putout of a base runner who is required to run; the putout is accomplished by holding the ball while touching the base to which the runner must advance before the runner reaches that base
examples: the shortstop got the runner at second on a force

meanings.definition: terminate the employment of; discharge from an office or position
examples: The boss fired his secretary today
The company terminated 25% of its workers
The police routed them out of bed at 2 A.M.

meanings.definition: press, force, or thrust out of a small space
examples: The weeds crowded out the flowers

meanings.definition: expel from one's property or force to move out by a legal process
examples: The landlord evicted the tenants after they had not paid the rent for four months

meanings.definition: cause to come out in a squirt
examples: the boy squirted water at his little sister

meanings.definition: emit or cause to move with force of effort
